name: Greek Cheese Traingles: Tiropitakia
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by combining all ingredients.
2. For the phyllo layers, use two whole buttered sheets. Stack them and cut into six strips.
3. Place a heaping teaspoon of filling on the bottom of each pastry strip.
4. Use the triangle folding method to fold the pastry (similar to folding up a flag).
5. Repeat with additional phyllo layers and filling as directed.
6. Brush the pastries with melted butter.
7. Bake at 350°F to 375°F for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. These can be prepared ahead of time and frozen before baking.
9. Note: An alternative variation includes adding 1/3 cup chopped walnuts to the filling. Both versions have similar ingredients but differ slightly.
